view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email opened status is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email opened status is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of branching logic by confirming the presence of a condition step in the marketing campaign that checks if an email was opened. Specifically, the evidence shows a step with the key 'if_opened' that directs to different actions based on the condition of the email being opened or not, which directly aligns with the requirement stated. This is supported by the evidence from the prior step validation, which confirms the existence of this branching logic.
